description: Configure Bridge Command to broadcast NMEA 0183 navigation data (Position & Heading) via UDP to localhost (127.0.0.1) on port 10110. Capture at least 30 seconds of this data using a Python script named 'capture_nmea.py' on the Desktop that prints received data and saves raw NMEA sentences to '/home/ga/Documents/nmea_raw.log'. Create a report at '/home/ga/Documents/integration_report.txt' identifying the NMEA Talker IDs for Position and Heading sentences and the UTC timestamp of the first captured GGA sentence.
